Class SetOfBoxes

java.lang.Object
kp.restful.data.SetOfBoxes
@Path("boxes") public class SetOfBoxes extends Object
Set of boxes.

Example of a root resource class using JAX-RS annotations.

      public static void reset()
      Resets data store for repeatable runs of the client.

    • createBox

      @POST @Consumes("application/json") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response createBox(@Valid @Valid Box box)

      Annotated with resource method designator POST.

      Parameters:
      box - the Box
      Returns:
      the confirmation response

    • readBox

      @GET @Path("{id}") @Produces("application/json") public Box readBox(@PathParam("id") int id)

      Annotated with resource method designator GET.

      Parameters:
      id - the id
      Returns:
      the Box

    • readBoxes

      @GET @Produces("application/json") public List<Box> readBoxes()
      Reads all boxes.

      Annotated with resource method designator GET.

      Returns:
      the list of boxes

    • updateBox

      @PUT @Path("{id}") @Consumes("application/json") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response updateBox(@PathParam("id") int id, @Valid @Valid Box box)
      Updates a single Box (with validation enabled).

      Annotated with resource method designator PUT.

      Parameters:
      id - the id
      box - the Box
      Returns:
      the response

    • deleteBox

      @DELETE @Path("{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response deleteBox(@PathParam("id") int id)
      Deletes a single Box.

      Annotated with resource method designator DELETE.

      Parameters:
      id - the id
      Returns:
      the response
